query:
INSERT INTO product_price (
            id,
            "productId",
            name,
            description,
            "priceAmount",
            "priceCurrency",
            "recurringInterval",
            "isDefault",
            "processorPriceId"
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
